name: codex-subagent
description: Drive the OpenAI Codex CLI (codex exec, gpt-5.5) as implementer/reviewer/critic subagents from Claude Code — a controller loop with a wrapper that encodes the -s danger-full-access unlock, dual timeouts, output capture, bwrap detection, and partial-run recovery

interface.shortDescription: Drive the OpenAI Codex CLI (codex exec, gpt-5.5) as implementer/reviewer/critic subagents from Claude Code — a controller loop with a wrapper that encodes the -s danger-full-access unlock, dual timeouts, output capture, bwrap detection, and partial-run recovery

interface.defaultPrompt: Use the codex-subagent plugin for this task.
